'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 39''' was the thirty-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[September 25]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Dispute on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]
*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
*[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - Amidala's Apartments
*[[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech Droids]]
*Weapons Manufacturers
*[[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class Imperial Landing Craft]]
